reviews.author: Lorenzo Stoakes (Oracle)
reviews.summary: LGTM'd the patch without raising any concerns or suggestions.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch deduplicates the unlock_list_lru() function, which is currently implemented twice in the mm/list_lru.c file for MEMCG and non-MEMCG variants. The patch consolidates these implementations into a single common function.
